empty: No providers yet. Create the first one.
deleteConfirm: Delete provider “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone; deletion is rejected if dependent profiles exist.
fieldNameHint: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only, up to 63 chars
fieldTypeHint: name of a registered CloudDriver plugin
fieldFqdnSuffixHint: required for VM self-onboarding; omitted — self-onboarding unavailable
fieldCredentialsValueHint: Key: value pairs (e.g. access_key, secret_key), one per line. Keeper stores them in Vault for you; values are not shown after saving. Requires a TLS-fronted Operator API.
fieldCredentialsRefHint: Format vault:<mount>/<path>. The secret is resolved from Vault; the value is not stored in the database.
errorNameTaken: A provider with this name already exists. Choose another name.
errorForbidden: Insufficient permissions for this operation (requires provider.create / provider.delete).
errNamePattern: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only (max 63)
errTypePattern: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only (max 63)
